proposal1.heroHeadline: Brightwave is losing 2,000 hours a year on proposals. Here is exactly where it goes.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Currently, crafting a proposal drains hours. With our system, it’s done in 47 seconds, tailored to your services.
proposal1.problemsIntro: These are not inconveniences, these are ongoing losses for Brightwave.

problems.title: Time Drain
problems.description: Brightwave spends 2,000 hours annually on proposal creation. Each hour not spent on client engagement is a missed revenue opportunity.

problems.title: Costly Errors
problems.description: Manual proposal creation leads to errors costing Brightwave $50,000 annually. Errors erode client trust and lead to lost deals.

problems.title: Lost Deals
problems.description: Delayed proposals cost Brightwave 10% of potential deals each year. Every delayed response is a client lost to competitors.

problems.title: Inconsistent Branding
problems.description: Inconsistent proposal branding costs Brightwave $30,000 in lost brand value. Brand inconsistency reduces market perception and client retention.

problems.title: Resource Overload
problems.description: Proposal creation overwhelms staff, costing $100,000 in overtime and burnout. Employee burnout decreases productivity and increases turnover costs.

problems.title: Opportunity Cost
problems.description: Time spent on proposals detracts from innovation, costing Brightwave $200,000 in potential growth. Lack of focus on core services stifles business expansion.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Introducing a system that replaces all these losses with streamlined efficiency.

solutions.title: Instant Proposals
solutions.description: Currently, proposals take precious hours. The system delivers them in 47 seconds. Time saved is time earned.

solutions.title: Error-Free Output
solutions.description: Manual processes lead to costly errors. The AI ensures every proposal is accurate and brand-aligned.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Inconsistent branding confuses clients. Our system ensures every proposal reflects Brightwave's brand perfectly.

solutions.title: Resource Optimization
solutions.description: Staff overwhelmed by proposals lose focus. The system frees them to innovate and engage with clients.

solutions.title: Enhanced Deal Closure
solutions.description: Delayed responses lose deals. With instant proposals, capture opportunities and increase closure rates.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Peakdigital's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Peakdigital around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Brightwave.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Elevate Acme Corp's Digital Presence with Brightwave's Expertise.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: We propose a comprehensive strategy to boost your online conversion rates and enhance customer engagement.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Every day, Acme Corp is experiencing losses due to untapped digital potential.

problems.title: Low Conversion Rates
problems.description: With a current conversion rate of just 1.5%, Acme Corp is losing potential revenue from 98.5% of website visitors.

problems.title: High Cart Abandonment
problems.description: Over 70% of customers leave their cart without purchasing, resulting in significant revenue loss.

problems.title: Poor Mobile Experience
problems.description: An outdated mobile interface is causing a 60% bounce rate on mobile visits.

problems.title: Limited Audience Reach
problems.description: Current strategies reach only 40% of the target audience, missing out on valuable market segments.

problems.title: Insufficient Brand Engagement
problems.description: Low engagement levels result in missed opportunities for repeat business and customer loyalty.

problems.title: Underperforming Email Campaigns
problems.description: An average open rate of 15% means most of your emails are not read, leading to lost sales opportunities.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Brightwave offers tailored solutions to address these losses and drive growth for Acme Corp.

solutions.title: Website Optimization
solutions.description: Enhances user experience and increases conversion rates by improving site design and functionality.

solutions.title: Mobile App Development
solutions.description: Creates a seamless mobile experience to reduce bounce rates and improve engagement.

solutions.title: Email Marketing
solutions.description: Boosts open and conversion rates with targeted, personalized email campaigns.

solutions.title: Digital Advertising
solutions.description: Expands audience reach and brand visibility through strategic ad placements.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: Brightwave stands as a leader in driving digital transformations with proven results.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Track Record
whyUsCards.description: We have successfully transformed digital strategies for numerous industry leaders.

whyUsCards.title: Client-Centric Approach
whyUsCards.description: Our solutions are tailored to the specific needs and goals of each client.

whyUsCards.title: Innovative Solutions
whyUsCards.description: We leverage the latest technologies to deliver cutting-edge digital experiences.

whyUsCards.title: Data-Driven Strategies
whyUsCards.description: Our approach is informed by data and analytics to ensure maximum ROI.

socialProof.label: Growth in conversion rates for clients.
